title: potentilla villosa var. stricticaulis
intro: Potentilla villosa var. stricticaulis, also known as the rough-leaved cinquefoil, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its hairy leaves and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla villosa var. stricticaulis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues.
